name: bankstract-cloud
description: Hosted statement parsing API for Nigerian banks. AGPL-3.0 SaaS layer over the bankstract MIT engine.
author: Jeffery Orazulike (https://github.com/logickoder)

scripts.dev:worker: cd apps/worker && uv run uvicorn bankstract_cloud.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:all: (kill -9 $(lsof -ti:8000) $(lsof -ti:3000) 2>/dev/null || true) && pnpm --filter app db:push && concurrently -k -n worker,app -c blue,green "pnpm dev:worker" "pnpm --filter app dev"
